title: ADP consensus (drafter market) - opponent model + value flags ONLY
description: FantasyFootballCalculator PPR ADP joined to our projection pool by name+position. POLICY BOUNDARY: ADP is the market of fantasy drafters. It models the simulated opponents in the draft simulator and flags value-vs-ADP; it is NEVER blended into projections, weights, or game probabilities. Rows without a gsis_id are real draftable players we do not project - kept for the opponent board, never given fabricated points.
